title: baliospermum calycinum var. balansae
intro: Baliospermum calycinum var. balansae, also known as the 'Dhathri plant', is a rare and medicinal plant native to India. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include treating various skin conditions, wound healing, and reducing fever. The herbal preparations of Baliospermum calycinum var. balansae include extracts and oils used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal and therapeutic applications.
